{{CargoRelic
|name=Pawson's Head
|class_id=20233
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This fearful head once belonged to Beast God, one of the eight Demon Gods. As the ruler of the beasts, he has an incomparably strong body with mixed animal genes. He never expected that he would be defeated by a snail and have his head be part of a collection.
|fame=18
|art=13
|fth=34
|civ=14
|tech=12
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail RUSH +10<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail RUSH +20<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail RUSH +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail RUSH +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail RUSH +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8<br> (Awakened)
}}
